name: Redline
description: Annotate elements in a running web app and auto-fix the flagged issues in code.
longDescription: Two modes: `/redline setup` installs a dev-only annotation overlay (hotkey-activated, click-to-annotate, exports JSON), and `/redline <path>` reads the annotation file, maps each annotation to source files via selector/class/text search, and dispatches parallel fix agents. Supports Vite, Next.js, Remix, SvelteKit, CRA, Tauri, and plain HTML. Ambiguous annotations are flagged for clarification instead of guessed.
